headline: M&T Bank (MTB) Renews Partnership with The Florida Bar to Provide Free Access to Nota
summary: M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE:MTB) is one of the most profitable value stocks to invest in now. On June 11, M&T Bank renewed its partnership with The Florida Bar to continue offering members free access to the Nota platform. This cloud-based tool is designed to help attorneys manage Interest on Trust Accounts/IOTA more efficiently and maintain […]
